reference_notes: Canonical multiblock ROSA in NumPy (Liland, Næs & Indahl 2016). Reproduces R `multiblock::rosa(canonical=TRUE)` exactly for single-target Y; for q >= 2 it uses proper column-mean centering and diverges from R `multiblock` because that package recycles `colMeans(y)` incorrectly. pls4all matches this NumPy reference for q == 1 at IEEE round-off.
R `multiblock::rosa 0.8.10` (Liland, Næs & Indahl 2016). ROSA's greedy block-selection-per-component may diverge from pls4all's ordering — tolerance widened.
